properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This is no time for fear This is a time for faith and determination Don't lose the vision here Carried away by the motion Hold on to all that you hide in your heart There is one thing that has always been true It holds the world together

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God is in control We believe that His children will not be forsaken God is in control We will choose to remember and never be shaken There is no power above or beside Him, we know God is in control

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: History marches on There is a bottom line drawn across the ages Culture can make its plan Oh, but the line never changes No matter how the deception may fly There is one thing that has always been true It will be true forever

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He has never let you down Why start to worry now? Why start to worry now? He is still the Lord of all we see And He is still the loving Father Watching over you and me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Watching over you, watching over me Watching over everything Watching over you, watching over me Every little sparrow, every little thing.
